creator: shuvaev@physik.uni-wuerzburg.de
text:
On Fri, May 21, 2010 at 08:50:08PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/gtkdatabox,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/146806 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/146806
> 
Oops. devel/glade3 is already more than a year at 1.so.9.
Never used gtkdatabox with glade...
Patch approved. Please commit.

Thanks,
Alexey.
